name: contextbridge
description: Transfer AI chat conversations between Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini seamlessly.
author: Your Name

scripts.build:all: node scripts/build.js chrome && node scripts/build.js firefox
scripts.package:chrome: node scripts/build.js chrome && cd dist/chrome && zip -r ../../releases/contextbridge-chrome.zip .
scripts.package:firefox: node scripts/build.js firefox && cd dist/firefox && zip -r ../../releases/contextbridge-firefox.zip .
